_doc: Fourth Edition (4ED) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/4ed.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 121C / 121U / 121R / 0M. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Belgian printing, striped collation 11x11 sheets. No foils (pre-1999). Also sold in 60-card starter decks.
